news.t: Need to Know: Why these lesser-known tech stocks are ready to shine in 2021, says this money manager

overview.description: The TrueShares Structured Outcome (December) ETF (DECZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses on the S&P 500 over a specific holdings period with uncapped gains, subject to strategy costs. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. DECZ was launched on Nov 30, 2020 and is issued by Truemark Group.

data.title: Need to Know: Why these lesser-known tech stocks are ready to shine in 2021, says this money manager
data.text: Michael Loukas, CEO of ETF provider TrueMark Investments, says these are the trends to look out for in the coming year. Among them, 'category killer' tech stocks that dominate their fields.
